#1/LITTLE. DEFT'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED. CASE ASSIGNED TO #8 FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AND/OR TRIAL.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURCHIN, GABRIEL $8,608.97 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,608.97, PLTF AWARDED $ 16.78 PER DIEM DAMAGES AFTER 08/27/97. PLTF ALLOWED TO SELL THE VESSELS WITH THE PROCEEDS TO BE FIRST APPLIED TO THE ACTUAL COSTS OF SALE THEN TO DISCHARGE THE PLTF'S LIENS. AFTER THE SALE A DEFICIENCY JUDGMENT MAY BE ORDERED. SEE JUDGMENT IN FILE FOR MORE DETAILS.
